# [CHECKLIST TYPE] Checklist / 检查清单: [FEATURE NAME]

**Purpose**: [Brief description of what this checklist covers]  
**用途**：[本清单覆盖内容的简要说明]  
**Created**: [DATE]  
**创建日期**：[DATE]  
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md or relevant documentation]  
**功能**：[链接到 spec.md 或相关文档]

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.  
**说明**：此清单由 `/speckit.checklist` 命令依据功能上下文与需求生成。

## [Category 1] / [类别 1]

- [ ] CHK001 First checklist item with clear action / 第一项清单，含明确动作
- [ ] CHK002 Second checklist item / 第二项清单
- [ ] CHK003 Third checklist item / 第三项清单

## [Category 2] / [类别 2]

- [ ] CHK004 Another category item / 另一类别项
- [ ] CHK005 Item with specific criteria / 含具体标准的清单项
- [ ] CHK006 Final item in this category / 本类别最后一项

## Notes / 备注

- Check items off as completed: `[x]` / 完成时勾选：`[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline / 可直接在行内补充备注或发现
- Link to relevant resources or documentation / 链接相关资源或文档
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference / 清单项按顺序编号便于引用
